description: Structured work history and professional episodes for Kyle Becker.

experiences.summary: Fractional product, design, and research work on consumer app retention and onboarding for Rocketbook under BIC.
experiences.title: Fractional PM / Designer / Researcher

experiences.outcomes: Contributed to MVP research and design; company later pivoted. Work informed Kyle's view that crypto's bottleneck is often usefulness and demand, not usability alone.
experiences.summary: Exploratory research, wireframing, and Figma component toolkit for an early-stage retail DeFi wallet using account abstraction. Research tested whether lowering UX barriers would attract users who had already cooled on crypto by 2023.
experiences.title: Research & Design

experiences.summary: Led UX research for four public reports on cryptocurrency adoption and product design as part of a World Economic Forum initiative.
experiences.title: Research Lead

experiences.summary: UX strategy and design for institutional blockchain products in J.P. Morgan's Onyx division (now Kinexys), including collateral management workflows.
experiences.title: Design Strategist

experiences.summary: UX leadership at an AI startup (later Lightning AI) during early product definition and design.
experiences.title: UX Lead

experiences.summary: Led UX during a retail banking digital transformation in an emerging market, including agile delivery and customer research across Myanmar.
experiences.title: UX Lead

experiences.summary: Design research and future-casting workshops for China's largest car-sharing company across Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Chengdu, plus men's skincare and China market research engagements.
experiences.title: Interaction Designer

experiences.summary: Co-founded a healthtech startup focused on remittances and cross-border healthcare payments.
experiences.title: CEO / Co-founder

experiences.summary: Early career interaction design on financial services products, knowledge-sharing tools, and global design research including field work in the Netherlands.
experiences.title: Interaction Designer

title: Kyle Becker experience records
